message:
fix(runtime): require &mut self for TaskHandle::join to match oneshot receiver semantics

Change TaskHandle::join and join_with_drop_reason from &self to &mut self,
aligning with the underlying oneshot::Receiver::recv requirement that
prevents concurrent joins on the same handle at the type level.

Update all callers across the codebase: Scope::{join, race, race_all,
join_all, hedge}, ActorHandle, GenServerHandle, RemoteHandle, plan
fixtures, supervised app examples, and integration tests.

Simplify Scope::race and Scope::hedge to rely on JoinFuture drop-reason
mechanics instead of explicit abort_with_reason + await pairs, reducing
code duplication.

Move task record removal in RuntimeState::complete_task to after
obligation leak collection so obligation data is still accessible when
collecting and reporting leaks.

Add missing drop(guard) in three_lane scheduler test to release the
lock before assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
